summary.en: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division under MoST is the main standards and testing body. Standards are largely voluntary, but regulated or tendered categories can require conformity documentation, test reports, product specifications, labels, and importer declarations. EV chargers should be prepared with an IEC or MS/IEC mapped file for MSTRD or buyer review.
summary.zh: 缅甸科技部下属 Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division 是主要标准和测试机构。标准总体以自愿为主，但受监管或招标类别可能要求合格性文件、测试报告、产品规格、标签和进口商声明。电动汽车充电桩应准备映射至 IEC 或 MS/IEC 的文件包，以供 MSTRD 或买方审查。
summary.zht: 緬甸科技部下屬 Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division 是主要標準和測試機構。標準總體以自願為主，但受監管或招標類別可能要求合格性文件、測試報告、產品規格、標籤和進口商聲明。電動汽車充電樁應準備映射至 IEC 或 MS/IEC 的文件包，以供 MSTRD 或買方審查。

summary.en: China domestic files typically include GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, GB/T 27930 where applicable, CPCNEC safety materials, and CCC baseline certificates or test reports where in scope.
summary.zh: 中国国内文件通常包括 GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、适用时的 GB/T 27930、CPCNEC 安全材料，以及范围内的 CCC 基线证书或测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國國內文件通常包括 GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、適用時的 GB/T 27930、CPCNEC 安全材料，以及範圍內的 CCC 基線證書或測試報告。

gap.en: China GB documents should be converted into a Myanmar review dossier that explains IEC equivalence, deviations, rated voltage, grid conditions, connector choice, safety protections, and installation requirements. Do not assume CCC or CPCNEC documents are automatically accepted.
gap.zh: 中国 GB 文件应转换为缅甸审查文件包，说明 IEC 等效性、偏差、额定电压、电网条件、接口选择、安全保护和安装要求。不得假定 CCC 或 CPCNEC 文件会被自动接受。
gap.zht: 中國 GB 文件應轉換為緬甸審查文件包，說明 IEC 等效性、偏差、額定電壓、電網條件、接口選擇、安全保護和安裝要求。不得假定 CCC 或 CPCNEC 文件會被自動接受。

mandatory_status.target: Standards largely voluntary; conformity documentation may be required for regulated categories, import review, tenders, or utility acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: CCC and China standards apply domestically where in scope

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology, Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a Myanmar-facing MSTRD dossier rather than shipping only China certificates. The standards route is often voluntary, but documentation can still be a market-access gate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应建立面向缅甸的 MSTRD 文件包，而不是只提交中国证书。标准路径通常为自愿，但文件仍可能成为市场准入门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應建立面向緬甸的 MSTRD 文件包，而不是只提交中國證書。標準路徑通常為自願，但文件仍可能成為市場准入門檻。

requirement_topic.en: MIC Commercial Import Permit and Investment Interface
requirement_topic.zh: MIC 商业进口许可及投资接口
requirement_topic.zht: MIC 商業進口許可及投資接口

summary.en: Commercial import of EV chargers into Myanmar may require importer registration, MIC or related import permit handling, customs documentation, invoice, packing list, HS classification, and project approvals where an investment project or charging network is involved. The importer should confirm whether the shipment is normal trade, project import, or investment-linked import.
summary.zh: 电动汽车充电桩商业进口缅甸可能需要进口商登记、MIC 或相关进口许可办理、海关文件、发票、装箱单、HS 归类，以及涉及投资项目或充电网络时的项目批准。进口商应确认该批货物属于普通贸易、项目进口还是投资相关进口。
summary.zht: 電動汽車充電樁商業進口緬甸可能需要進口商登記、MIC 或相關進口許可辦理、海關文件、發票、裝箱單、HS 歸類，以及涉及投資項目或充電網絡時的項目批准。進口商應確認該批貨物屬於普通貿易、項目進口還是投資相關進口。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Investment Commission import and investment permit practice
Importer registration and commercial licensing practice

summary.en: China export files usually include commercial invoice, packing list, export declaration, product certificates, GB/T and CCC documentation where applicable, and manufacturer test reports.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常包括商业发票、装箱单、出口报关、产品证书、适用时的 GB/T 和 CCC 文件，以及制造商测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常包括商業發票、裝箱單、出口報關、產品證書、適用時的 GB/T 和 CCC 文件，以及製造商測試報告。

gap.en: China export paperwork does not replace Myanmar import permission. The importer must align HS code, permit route, project status, and port route before shipment, especially for Yangon, Thilawa, or Mandalay overland entry.
gap.zh: 中国出口文件不能替代缅甸进口许可。进口商应在出货前确认 HS 编码、许可路径、项目状态和口岸路径，尤其是经仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒陆路进口时。
gap.zht: 中國出口文件不能替代緬甸進口許可。進口商應在出貨前確認 HS 編碼、許可路徑、項目狀態和口岸路徑，尤其是經仰光、迪拉瓦或曼德勒陸路進口時。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where import permit, project approval, or customs licensing applies
mandatory_status.cn: China export clearance applies before departure but does not satisfy Myanmar import permission

source.publisher: Directorate of Investment and Company Administration, Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm MIC or related import-permit handling before shipment. Customs clearance risk is separate from technical conformity risk.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应确认 MIC 或相关进口许可办理。海关清关风险与技术合格性风险是两个不同事项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應確認 MIC 或相關進口許可辦理。海關清關風險與技術合格性風險是兩個不同事項。

requirement_topic.en: Customs Route, Port Entry, and Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 海关路径、口岸入境及文件
requirement_topic.zht: 海關路徑、口岸入境及文件

summary.en: EV charger shipments commonly enter Myanmar through Yangon or Thilawa seaport routes, with Mandalay relevant for overland logistics. Customs review may require correct HS classification, import licence evidence, conformity documents, invoice, packing list, bill of lading or waybill, and importer tax or company records.
summary.zh: 电动汽车充电桩货物通常可经仰光或迪拉瓦海港进入缅甸，曼德勒则与陆路物流相关。海关审查可能要求正确 HS 归类、进口许可证据、合格性文件、发票、装箱单、提单或运单，以及进口商税务或公司记录。
summary.zht: 電動汽車充電樁貨物通常可經仰光或迪拉瓦海港進入緬甸，曼德勒則與陸路物流相關。海關審查可能要求正確 HS 歸類、進口許可證據、合格性文件、發票、裝箱單、提單或運單，以及進口商稅務或公司記錄。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Customs Department import documentation practice
Yangon and Thilawa seaport customs procedures
Mandalay overland logistics and customs practice

summary.en: China-side paperwork covers export declaration, invoice, packing list, certificate package, and logistics documents, but usually does not determine Myanmar HS treatment or import licence status.
summary.zh: 中国侧文件包括出口报关、发票、装箱单、证书包和物流文件，但通常不能决定缅甸 HS 处理或进口许可状态。
summary.zht: 中國側文件包括出口報關、發票、裝箱單、證書包和物流文件，但通常不能決定緬甸 HS 處理或進口許可狀態。

gap.en: The Myanmar importer should pre-clear the HS code and permit packet before cargo departure. A technically acceptable charger can still be delayed if import licence, tax, or customs descriptions do not match.
gap.zh: 缅甸进口商应在货物启运前预先确认 HS 编码和许可文件包。即使技术上可接受，若进口许可、税务或海关品名描述不一致，货物仍可能延误。
gap.zht: 緬甸進口商應在貨物啟運前預先確認 HS 編碼和許可文件包。即使技術上可接受，若進口許可、稅務或海關品名描述不一致，貨物仍可能延誤。

mandatory_status.cn: China export customs clearance is separate and only covers departure from China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat customs routing as a separate workstream. Yangon, Thilawa, and Mandalay routes should each be checked for paperwork and broker requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将海关路径作为独立工作流处理。仰光、迪拉瓦和曼德勒路径均应分别核查文件和报关代理要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將海關路徑作為獨立工作流處理。仰光、迪拉瓦和曼德勒路徑均應分別核查文件和報關代理要求。

summary.en: Myanmar does not have a confirmed horizontal RoHS regime equivalent to the EU RoHS Directive for EV chargers. Environmental, battery, packaging, hazardous-substance, or waste requirements may still appear in project specifications, tender terms, or sectoral rules, but they should not be described as a national horizontal RoHS requirement unless confirmed.
summary.zh: 缅甸未确认存在等同欧盟 RoHS 指令、适用于电动汽车充电桩的横向 RoHS 制度。环保、电池、包装、有害物质或废弃物要求仍可能出现在项目规格、招标条款或行业规则中，但除非已确认，不应描述为全国性横向 RoHS 要求。
summary.zht: 緬甸未確認存在等同歐盟 RoHS 指令、適用於電動汽車充電樁的橫向 RoHS 制度。環保、電池、包裝、有害物質或廢棄物要求仍可能出現在項目規格、招標條款或行業規則中，但除非已確認，不應描述為全國性橫向 RoHS 要求。

standards_or_laws: No confirmed horizontal Myanmar RoHS equivalent for EV chargers

summary.en: China products may include China RoHS marking or supplier material declarations in addition to GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, CPCNEC safety, and CCC baseline documents.
summary.zh: 中国产品除 GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、CPCNEC 安全及 CCC 基线文件外，可能包含中国 RoHS 标识或供应商材料声明。
summary.zht: 中國產品除 GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234、CPCNEC 安全及 CCC 基線文件外，可能包含中國 RoHS 標識或供應商材料聲明。

gap.en: Do not copy EU RoHS logic into the Myanmar target column. The honest position is that Myanmar lacks a confirmed horizontal RoHS requirement for EV chargers, while buyers may still request material declarations contractually.
gap.zh: 不得将欧盟 RoHS 逻辑复制到缅甸目标栏。准确表述应为缅甸缺乏已确认的电动汽车充电桩横向 RoHS 要求，但买方仍可能通过合同要求材料声明。
gap.zht: 不得將歐盟 RoHS 邏輯複製到緬甸目標欄。準確表述應為緬甸缺乏已確認的電動汽車充電樁橫向 RoHS 要求，但買方仍可能透過合同要求材料聲明。

mandatory_status.target: No confirmed horizontal RoHS mandate for EV chargers; contractual or project environmental requirements may apply
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS may apply domestically depending on product classification and marking obligations

source.publisher: Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Conservation, Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar should be mapped as no confirmed horizontal RoHS for EV chargers. Provide material declarations only where the importer, tender, or buyer asks for them.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸应映射为未确认存在电动汽车充电桩横向 RoHS。仅在进口商、招标或买方要求时提供材料声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸應映射為未確認存在電動汽車充電樁橫向 RoHS。僅在進口商、招標或買方要求時提供材料聲明。
